content.heading: Application Consultant
info: Under the Data team, I was responsible for engineering, developing and integrating data ETL processing pipelines using Airflow (Python), Informatica and deploying them onto AWS Ec2 as well as DynamoDB and Redshift.

Other than development i was challanged to model and design reliable data warehousing ETL storage strategies such as Slowly Changing Data (SCD) on AWS Redshift as well as ensure performance and analytic capabilites of the data were met
I also took lead in solving and enhancing existing multi data-source ETL processing logic for legacy workflow as well as designed and implemented table and data structure migration solutions

content.heading: Intern Developer
info: During my internship i was responsible for developing the CI/CD Test and Release pipeline for the flagship IOS Application & also implemented CloudKit Data Sync on IOS App and WatchOS Companion

content.heading: MSc Business Information Systems
info: Business Digital Transformation  - Focusing on business process re-engineering and IT within an organization

content.heading: BEng. Computer Science
info: Research Topic (Bachelors Thesis) on Human Activity Recognition on daily activity movements using sampled data from Accelerometer and Gyroscopes of Smartphone devices provided by by the National Natural Science Foundation of China (No. 61501207). Utilized MATLAB for analysing, cleaning and generating feature and Implemented experiments using Python with Pandas, Scikit-learn and TensorFlow Libraries to run prediction models such as Support Vector Machines, Multi-layer Perceptron, Convolutional neural Network.
